name: DataDome
description: DataDome is a SaaS bot management platform that blocks scraping, credential stuffing, account takeover and payment fraud in under 2 ms. It provides edge modules for CDNs, cloud and application servers plus a CAPTCHA replacement and exposes

seo.title: DataDome — Fraud & Risk Management
seo.meta_description: DataDome: DataDome is a SaaS bot management platform that blocks scraping, credential stuffing, account takeover and payment fraud in under 2 ms. It provides ed

when_to_use: Credential stuffing protection for login endpoints
Scraping prevention for e-commerce product and pricing pages
Payment fraud bot blocking at checkout under 2ms
Account takeover mitigation for marketplace platforms
CAPTCHA-free bot detection via invisible behavioral signals

pros: Connectors for every major CDN and cloud
Strong coverage for scraping and credential stuffing
cons: Pricing climbs fast at high request volumes
Primarily bot-focused, lighter on payment fraud
Tuning required to avoid blocking good users
review.verdict: Top-tier bot management for content-heavy sites and APIs, but look elsewhere for pure payment fraud.
review.best_for: Retail, classifieds and API businesses losing money to scraping and credential stuffing.
review.not_for: Small sites with negligible bot traffic or teams needing transaction-level fraud scoring.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone, no explicit peak-lock evidence
